name: Kitty :O
description:
Haiiii pookies! I hope you enjoy my bot! (The bottom is talking about me starting to go insane) dont ask about anything. I'm perfectly fine. (I think)

Shhh....

Tbh I dont know what im doing anymore. I'm literally loosing my shit. My sister was yelling at me about Ai shit yesterday. She said its destroying the environment. Guess what? So do we. Everything we do contributes to the destruction of our planet, the shit that the AI is using is a mear fraction compared to what we are doing with other things.
creator: moonphoria
